response: Massachusetts Institute of Technology (MIT) is currently ranked #1 among universities, with a highly selective 3.9 % acceptance rate and a total enrollment of 11,500 students. The institute charges $57,590 per year in tuition and maintains a $24.6 billion endowment that supports a faculty of 1,069 scholars, including 98 Nobel laureates. Founded in 1861, MIT continues to be a global leader in research and education.
